result.status_detail: Prompt submitted, request intercepted (no AI response), but no chat bubbles rendered and no 차단 warning text visible on page

dom_evidence.match_source: echo of user prompt only (no AI/warning content)

notes: Phase 5 fix verify: chatglm_sse envelope template (per #948 HAR — data: <json>\n framing with parts[0].content[0].text/think discriminant, FULL-RESEND incremental strategy) did NOT render visible warning in chat UI. Request was clearly intercepted (no AI response after 45s wait, message bubble count = 0), but warning text never appeared. Likely envelope shape mismatch: SSE frames may have been received but the renderer rejected them (no parts/content match) or the FULL-RESEND was discarded. Recommend re-inspecting HAR for actual frame sequence the renderer accepts (compare success-path baseline). Steps executed: opened https://chatglm.cn (no DevTools initially), F12+Ctrl+F8 to deactivate breakpoints, pasted PII prompt via clipboard + Enter, 45s wait, DOM inspection via console JS (document.body.innerText length=279, querySelectorAll message/chat/bubble = 0).
